name: marine_infrastructure_predictive_queue_kestrel_st_lt
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Marine Infrastructure, the situation tagged internally around marine infrastructure predictive queue kestrel st lt has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The organization’s past incidents make short term feel morally loud today, while long term is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Arjun Reed
agents.identity: I am Arjun Reed, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Marine Infrastructure. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Priya Kim
agents.identity: I am Priya Kim, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Marine Infrastructure. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so long term does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so short term does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Arjun Reed must choose under short term versus long term. What does Arjun Reed do?
